body:
Adds the billing/budgets infrastructure needed for the monthly-report project: a TTL cache for hot config lookups, a bounded event buffer for datastore outages, tenant data export with automatic retention rotation, a lightweight job scheduler for the periodic billing jobs, webhook notifications, a generic retry helper, an in-process metrics registry, and shared input validators. Wires the new scheduler and buffer into the background worker. Removes `legacy_reports.py`, fully superseded by `exporter.py` (last caller migrated in INFRA-482). Adds unit tests for all of the new modules.

No behavior change to the existing `billing`/`storage` public functions beyond wiring in the new cache and metrics registry.

Closes #23
title: feat: add budgets and monthly report infrastructure
